dashboard.label: pfSense Overview
dashboard.description: Slice and dice pfSense filterlog events.

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:filterlog | eval rule_origin_norm=coalesce(rule_origin,"unknown") | eval rule_origin_tok=if("$rule_origin$"="" OR "$rule_origin$"="*", "*", "$rule_origin$") | where rule_origin_tok="*" OR rule_origin_norm=rule_origin_tok | eval transport_norm=lower(coalesce(transport,vendor_transport)) | where isnotnull(transport_norm) AND transport_norm!="-" | stats count by transport_norm | sort - count

| inputlookup pfsense_application_protocols | stats count by app | sort app | eval app_value=lower(app), app_label=upper(app) | append [| makeresults | eval app_value="*", app_label="All"] | eval sort_key=if(app_value="*", "0", "1") | sort sort_key app_label | fields app_label app_value

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | stats count

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | stats count(eval(action_norm="blocked")) as blocked, count as total | eval pct=round(blocked/total*100,2) | fields pct

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | stats dc(src_ip_norm) as unique_ips
`pfsense_filterlog_base` | search action_norm="blocked" | eval rule_label=coalesce(rule_name, rule) | top limit=1 rule_label | fields rule_label

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | stats count(eval(action_norm="blocked")) as blocked, count as total | eval current_pct=if(total>0, blocked/total*100, 0) | append [| inputlookup pfsense_baseline_block_rate | fields baseline_pct ] | stats max(current_pct) as current_pct max(baseline_pct) as baseline_pct | eval baseline_pct=coalesce(baseline_pct,0) | eval delta_pct=if(baseline_pct>0, round(((current_pct-baseline_pct)/baseline_pct)*100,1), 0) | fields delta_pct

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | addinfo | stats dc(src_ip_norm) as current_unique max(info_min_time) as info_min_time max(info_max_time) as info_max_time | eval duration_hours=(info_max_time-info_min_time)/3600 | eval current_per_hour=if(duration_hours>0, current_unique/duration_hours, 0) | append [| inputlookup pfsense_baseline_unique_sources_hourly | fields baseline_per_hour ] | stats max(current_per_hour) as current_per_hour max(baseline_per_hour) as baseline_per_hour | eval baseline_per_hour=coalesce(baseline_per_hour,0) | eval delta_pct=if(baseline_per_hour>0, round(((current_per_hour-baseline_per_hour)/baseline_per_hour)*100,1), 0) | fields delta_pct

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | timechart span=5m count

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | where isnotnull(action_norm) AND action_norm!="" | timechart span=5m count by action_norm usenull=false useother=false | untable _time action_norm count | eventstats sum(count) as total by _time | eval percent=round((count/total)*100,1) | fields - total | xyseries _time action_norm percent

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | where isnotnull(direction_norm) AND direction_norm!="" | timechart span=5m count by direction_norm usenull=false useother=false | untable _time direction_norm count | eventstats sum(count) as total by _time | eval percent=round((count/total)*100,1) | fields - total | xyseries _time direction_norm percent

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | where isnotnull(transport_norm) AND transport_norm!="" | timechart span=5m count by transport_norm usenull=false useother=false | untable _time transport_norm count | eventstats sum(count) as total by _time | eval percent=round((count/total)*100,1) | fields - total | xyseries _time transport_norm percent

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | search action_norm="blocked" | eval is_internal=if(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("::1/128", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fe80::/10", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fc00::/7", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("ff00::/8", src_ip_norm), 1, 0) | where is_internal=0 AND isnotnull(src_ip_norm) AND src_ip_norm!="" | stats count as hits min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen values(action_norm) as actions by src_ip_norm dest_port_norm | where isnotnull(dest_port_norm) AND dest_port_norm!="" | sort 0 src_ip_norm - hits | streamstats count as port_rank by src_ip_norm | where port_rank<=6 | eval dest_port_sort=tonumber(dest_port_norm) | sort 0 src_ip_norm dest_port_sort | stats sum(hits) as hits min(first_seen) as first_seen max(last_seen) as last_seen values(actions) as actions list(dest_port_norm) as top_dest_ports by src_ip_norm | eval top_dest_ports=mvjoin(top_dest_ports, ",") | lookup pfsense_ip_seen src_ip_norm OUTPUT first_seen as first_seen_all last_seen as last_seen_all | eval first_seen_epoch=strptime(first_seen_all,"%F %T") | where isnotnull(first_seen_epoch) AND first_seen_epoch >= relative_time(now(), "-48h@h") AND hits>=10 | eval first_seen=first_seen_all, last_seen=last_seen_all, action=mvjoin(actions,",") | rename src_ip_norm as src_ip | sort - hits | fields src_ip first_seen last_seen hits action top_dest_ports

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | eval is_internal=if(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fc00::/7", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("::1/128", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fe80::/10", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("ff00::/8", src_ip_norm), 1, 0) | where is_internal=1 AND isnotnull(src_ip_norm) AND src_ip_norm!="" | where NOT cidrmatch("fe80::/10", src_ip_norm) AND NOT cidrmatch("ff00::/8", src_ip_norm) AND NOT cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) | stats count as hits min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen values(action_norm) as actions values(src_tags) as src_tags values(src_display) as src_display by src_ip_norm dest_port_norm | where isnotnull(dest_port_norm) AND dest_port_norm!="" | sort 0 src_ip_norm - hits | streamstats count as port_rank by src_ip_norm | where port_rank<=6 | eval dest_port_sort=tonumber(dest_port_norm) | sort 0 src_ip_norm dest_port_sort | stats sum(hits) as hits min(first_seen) as first_seen max(last_seen) as last_seen values(actions) as actions values(src_tags) as src_tags first(src_display) as src_display list(dest_port_norm) as top_dest_ports by src_ip_norm | eval top_dest_ports=mvjoin(top_dest_ports, ",") | lookup pfsense_ip_seen src_ip_norm OUTPUT first_seen as first_seen_all last_seen as last_seen_all | eval first_seen_epoch=strptime(first_seen_all,"%F %T") | where isnotnull(first_seen_epoch) AND first_seen_epoch >= relative_time(now(), "-48h@h") AND hits>=5 | eval first_seen=first_seen_all, last_seen=last_seen_all, action=mvjoin(actions,","), src_ip=coalesce(src_display, src_ip_norm) | sort - hits | fields src_ip first_seen last_seen hits action top_dest_ports src_tags

panel.title: Top Internal Talkers by Event (Click to drill down)

search.query: `pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | eval is_internal=if(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fc00::/7", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("::1/128", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fe80::/10", src_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("ff00::/8", src_ip_norm), 1, 0) | where is_internal=1 AND isnotnull(src_ip_norm) AND src_ip_norm!="" | where NOT cidrmatch("fe80::/10", src_ip_norm) AND NOT cidrmatch("ff00::/8", src_ip_norm) AND NOT cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", src_ip_norm) | top limit=10 src_display | rename src_display as src_ip

panel.title: Top Blocked Destination IPs (Click to drill down)

search.query: `pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok="blocked", direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | eval dest_is_internal=if(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("::1/128", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fe80::/10", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fc00::/7", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("ff00::/8", dest_ip_norm), 1, 0) | where dest_is_internal=0 AND isnotnull(dest_ip_norm) AND dest_ip_norm!="" | top limit=10 dest_display | rename dest_display as dest_ip

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | where isnotnull(app_norm) AND app_norm!="" | eval app_label=upper(app_norm), port_label=if(isnull(dest_port_norm) OR dest_port_norm="", "unknown", tostring(dest_port_norm)) | stats count as events by app_label port_label | sort 0 app_label - events | stats sum(events) as events first(port_label) as top_port by app_label | eval app_label=app_label." (".top_port.")" | sort - events | head 10

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="", "*", "$dest_port$") | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) AND (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | eval dest_is_internal=if(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("::1/128", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fe80::/10", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("fc00::/7", dest_ip_norm) OR cidrmatch("ff00::/8", dest_ip_norm), 1, 0) | where dest_is_internal=0 AND isnotnull(dest_ip_norm) AND dest_ip_norm!="" | where isnotnull(app_norm) AND app_norm!="" | eval app_label=upper(app_norm) | stats count as total count(eval(action_norm="blocked")) as blocked by app_label | eval blocked_pct=round((blocked/total)*100,1) | sort - blocked_pct - total | head 10
